case_title: NOCON, ANDY et al vs. EZEKIEL, ERIK et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGE DIANE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER: C/C FOR CT. TRIAL, STEVEN LITTMAN APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ERIK EZEKIEL. CASE PROCEEDS AS A PROVE-UP WITHOUT DEFENDANT. JUDGMENT SUBMITTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EZEKIEL, ERIK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 840 GEARY ST, #42 $1,612.06 RENT, $425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,037.06, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL.
